subcodes.first_line: Man is even as a mine rich in precious gems; through education can its treasures of character be revealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انسان بمثابه معدن که دارای احجار کریمه است مشاهده میشود بتربیت جواهر اخلاق
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @education and the development of capacity, @exhortations and counsels, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
